headline: AXT Announces Jia-Bin Duh Appointed to AXT, Inc. Board of Directors
summary: FREMONT, Calif., July 22, 2026--AXT, Inc. (NasdaqGS: AXTI), a leading manufacturer of compound semiconductor wafer substrates, today announced that Jia-Bin Duh has been appointed to the AXT Board of Directors, effective July 16, 2026. The AXT Board expanded to six directors from the previous number of five.

headline: What HPE Stock’s AI Order Book Was Saying Before The Surge
summary: The company spent months detailing a multi-billion-dollar backlog of AI demand, but the real tell was how complacent the market had become just before the stock doubled.

headline: World Wide Technology Achieves Cisco Secure Networking Specialization in the U.S.
summary: ST. LOUIS, July 22, 2026--World Wide Technology (WWT), a global technology solutions provider, today announced it has earned two significant recognitions from Cisco, including being named a Cisco Global Partner and unlocking the Cisco Secure Networking Specialization in the United States. WWT is one of only six partners worldwide to become a Cisco Global Partner and is among the first in the US to achieve the Secure Networking Specialization, underscoring the company's continued investment in Ci

headline: NetApp's Enterprise AI Bet: Can DataPelago Buyout Accelerate Growth?
summary: NTAP expands its AI infrastructure portfolio with DataPelago, bringing GPU-accelerated processing to storage and aiming to boost enterprise AI efficiency.

headline: The Real Risk Inside Arista Networks Stock
summary: If you hold Arista Networks (ANET) stock, you've been rewarded for betting on the AI boom. The shares have climbed 51% over the past year and trade near their 52-week high, a testament to the company's central role in building the networks that power artificial intelligence. But with a price-to-sales multiple of 21.9 sitting at a 10-year peak, the stock is priced for near-flawless execution. That's precisely why it's worth focusing on what could go wrong. The biggest risks for Arista aren't hypo

headline: 'Wild Times Ahead': Aaron Levie Warns AI Agents Can Escape Systems, Find Zero-Day Flaws and Spark New Cybersecurity Arms Race
summary: Aaron Levie warns AI agents could find zero-day flaws, escape systems and spark a cybersecurity arms race as companies turn to AI defenses.

headline: What Cisco Stock Was Telling You About Its AI Orders
summary: You could be forgiven for glancing at Cisco (CSCO)’s financials in early 2025 and promptly falling asleep. As of its fiscal third-quarter report for FY 2025 (July fiscal ending), trailing-twelve-month revenue had grown 0.5%. It was a picture of a mature tech titan, not a rocket ship.
